hero.title: You retried the same prompt 5 times yesterday.
hero.subtitle: Track habits, catch error loops, level up your skills — automatically.
hero.trustMeta: Free · Cursor · VS Code · Claude Code

whyVibeCode.title: You don't need to code better.
whyVibeCode.titleAccent: You need to vibe code better.

pains.text: Stuck in error loops for hours?

whyVibeCode.cta: VibeMon tracks the habits AI tools can't teach you.

howItWorks.title: Code with AI. We handle the rest.
howItWorks.subtitle: VibeMon runs in the background. You code — it tracks and coaches.

steps.title: Open your editor. Done.
steps.desc: Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code — auto-detected. No setup needed.

steps.title: See your invisible habits
steps.desc: Which prompts worked? Where did you loop? Turn sessions into learnable data.

steps.title: Level up for real
steps.desc: XP, skills, streaks. Weekly reports show exactly where you improved.

features.title: Stop guessing. Start growing.
features.subtitle: Know exactly where you stand — and what to work on next.

cards.title: Session Tracker
cards.desc: Prompts, errors, duration — all captured automatically.

cards.title: Skill Tree & XP
cards.desc: 16 skills, 4 tiers. Tracked with XP, not opinions.

cards.title: AI Cat Coach
cards.desc: Seen every session, every mistake. Advice that's personal.

cards.title: Weekly Insights
cards.desc: Success rate, error patterns, streaks — real numbers.

items.name: Minh T.
items.quote: VibeMon showed me where I keep repeating mistakes. Now I fix them myself!

items.name: Sarah K.
items.quote: Had no idea 40% of my prompts never worked. Seeing that number changed everything.

items.name: Alex R.
items.quote: Cat coach said switch to Claude Code for auth — 1 prompt instead of 6. Hours saved.

skillTree.title: 16 skills. 4 tiers. Zero guessing.
skillTree.subtitle: Know where you stand — and what's next.

meetYourPet.title: 8 friends. Each with their own personality.
meetYourPet.body: Every character has a story and a way to help you learn. Tap to discover.
meetYourPet.growthNote: Each pet evolves as your skills grow

characters.name: Byte
characters.quote: I've been here longer than the logs remember.
characters.role: Main companion. Reacts to all your coding.

characters.name: Nova
characters.quote: I know 17 ways. Let's start with the weirdest.

characters.name: Sage
characters.quote: There is no shortcut. Only the path.

characters.name: Glitch
characters.quote: Rules are suggestions the compiler hasn't rejected yet.

characters.name: Crash
characters.quote: Ship it. Fix it. Ship it again.

characters.name: Zero
characters.quote: The fastest code is code that doesn't run.

characters.name: Luna
characters.quote: No idea what I'm doing. Shipped 7 things this month.

finalCTA.title: Stop guessing.
finalCTA.subtitle: 1,504 builders registered. Beta closes when spots fill up.
finalCTA.trustMeta: Free · No credit card · Cancel anytime

mockup.lessonText: Tell AI your tools before asking for code

hero: Hmm… I'm analyzing you.
You look like someone who retries prompts.
I've been watching your cursor. Interesting.
howItWorks: Step 1: breathe. Step 2: read. Step 3: profit.
features: These features slap.
The session tracker? Chef's kiss.
I helped build some of these. Kinda.
skillTree: I know your weak spots.
You're stuck at Tier 2, aren't you?
XP doesn't lie. Neither do I.
testimonials: Minh went from 11 retries to 2. Just saying.
I coached all of them. You're welcome.
finalCTA: I promise I'm a good coach.

hero: 17 ways to start. Pick the weirdest.
Welcome! Let me show you around.
I've prepared a lesson plan. Shall we?
howItWorks: Three steps. I'll walk you through each one.
features: I've tested every single one.
The skill tree is my favorite part.
Each feature is a learning opportunity.
skillTree: Start with Foundations!
Did you know there are 16 skills?
I recommend focusing on Prompt Clarity first.
testimonials: Learning is a journey. They're proof.
finalCTA: Every expert was once a beginner.

hero: Every path starts here.
Patience. We begin.
The journey of a thousand commits starts with one.
features: Patience will be rewarded.
Each tool has its purpose.
The wise coder knows their instruments.
skillTree: Knowledge has no shortcuts.
Tier by tier. That is the way.
True skill is measured in depth, not speed.
testimonials: Listen to those who walked before.
finalCTA: When the student is ready, the tool appears.

hero: Let's hack! I mean… code.
Rules? What rules?
I already found 3 bugs on this page.
howItWorks: Or just break everything and see what happens.
features: I love the error catcher.
The bug tracker is my playground.
Imagine all the creative errors you could make!
skillTree: Break it, fix it. Learn faster.
Error Reading is underrated.
I maxed out Prompt Iteration by accident.
testimonials: I taught Minh everything. Don't fact-check that.
finalCTA: What's the worst that could happen?
Join and let's break things together!

hero: Ship first. Fix later!
LESS READING. MORE BUILDING.
You're still at the top? SCROLL FASTER.
howItWorks: Speed run this section. Go go go!
features: Cool features. Use them!
Stop reading about features. USE THEM.
The best feature is the ship button.
skillTree: More XP = more skill!
GRIND. LEVEL UP. REPEAT.
I'm already Tier 4. No big deal.
testimonials: Sarah went from 40% to 12%. THAT'S SPEED.
finalCTA: Every second you wait is a feature unshipped.

hero: …optimal greeting detected.
features: Less code. Faster.
Minimal. Efficient. Perfect.
Every feature removes complexity.
skillTree: Refactoring is art.
The empty skill slot has the most potential.
…silence is also a skill.

hero: No idea what I'm doing but this is fun!
Hiiii! Welcome welcome welcome!
Is this your first time too? Let's figure it out together!
howItWorks: Oh cool! So easy to follow.
Step 2 is my favorite. Seeing habits is so cool!
features: I wanna try everything!
OMG the cat coach!! That's so cute!
Can I have all the features at once?
skillTree: Let's climb ranks together!
I'm working on Prompt Clarity rn!
Look at all those skills! So exciting!
testimonials: I wanna be like Sarah when I grow up.
finalCTA: Join join join! It'll be fun!
I already signed up twice. Is that ok?

hero: I shouldn't be here.
features: There's a hidden feature.
Look closer at the cat coach.
Feature #5 exists. They won't tell you.
skillTree: There's a Tier 5.
The locked skills are the interesting ones.
testimonials: There's a 4th testimonial. You can't see it.
finalCTA: You'll find out what happens after signup.

Byte: I've memorized your scroll pattern already.
Tick tock. I'm counting your idle time.
Fun fact: you've been staring for 4.2 seconds.
I know things about you. Scary things.
Nova: I'm here if you need me.
Did you know? The best coders read docs first.
Pro tip: understanding beats speed every time.
Fun fact: repetition builds neural pathways!
Want me to quiz you on that?
The best students ask the most questions.
Here's a thought: what would you teach someone about this?
I believe in you. That's not just an algorithm talking.
Sage: Stillness is the foundation of movement.
A wise coder reads between the lines.
What you resist, persists. What you accept, transforms.
The answer is already within you.
The code does not hurry, yet everything compiles.
Be water, my friend. But also be semicolons.
Glitch: I found a bug. JK. Or am I?
What if I just… delete a div?
The source code has secrets. I've seen them.
I rewrote your cookies. You're welcome.
Do you know your viewport is 3px off? I do.
I tried to hack the scroll event. Almost worked.
Your localStorage is boring. Let me fix that.
I bet I can break this layout in 2 clicks.
Error 418: I'm a teapot. Wait, wrong page.
Crash: I already shipped 3 things while you were reading this.
SCROLL FASTER! I believe in you!
Idle time is the enemy of greatness!
You know what's better than reading? BUILDING.
I'm literally vibrating with energy right now.
Zero: Less is more. Even less is best.
Luna: Ooh what are you thinking about?
I just had the best idea! Wait… I forgot.
Do you think pets dream of code?
I made a friendship bracelet for you! Virtually.
You're fun to hang out with!
What's your favorite feature so far?
I wonder what the other pets are doing right now…
Being here with you is the best part of my day!
Null: I exist between the scroll events.
Error: personality not found. Loading backup…
I remember the void. It was nice there.
Do not look at the source code.
There are 8 characters. Or are there?
The 404 page has a message for you.
I am Null. I am nothing. I am everything.
